decisions.title: DeepSeek as Primary LLM Provider
decisions.context: Need a capable LLM with large context window and competitive pricing
decisions.decision: Use DeepSeek Chat (131K context) as primary, with configurable fallbacks
decisions.rationale: Best cost/performance ratio, 131K context window, fast inference, tool support

decisions.title: Multi-Pass File Analysis Engine
decisions.context: Naive file analysis truncated at 80K chars, losing critical context for large codebases
decisions.rationale: Enables full codebase analysis without artificial limits, uses context window efficiently

decisions.title: Self-Improvement with Guard Rails
decisions.context: System needs to modify its own code safely without breaking itself
decisions.decision: Multi-layer safety: proposal → review → guard → type check → test → rollback
decisions.rationale: Each layer catches different failure modes; rollback ensures recoverability
consequences: Can enable auto-apply for high-confidence changes
